coaching_recommendations: Target a consistent 7-9 hours; set a fixed bedtime and reduce screens 60 minutes before bed. Practice 10 minutes of guided breathing or mindfulness twice daily to lower evening arousal.
Target a consistent 7-9 hours; set a fixed bedtime and reduce screens 60 minutes before bed. Practice 10 minutes of guided breathing or mindfulness twice daily to lower evening arousal.

Target a consistent 7-9 hours; set a fixed bedtime and reduce screens 60 minutes before bed. Increase activity: add 2k-3k steps per day with short walking meetings or post-lunch walks. Practice 10 minutes of guided breathing or mindfulness twice daily to lower evening arousal. Monitor cardiovascular health; consider a BP check this week and consult a clinician if elevated persists. Ensure CPAP adherence and side-sleeping; consult a sleep specialist for device fit if comfort issues.
Maintain current routines; prioritize wind-down, daylight exposure, and regular activity.
